'''âh-f-d''' ('''kahafad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coconstruct|coconstruct]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coconstruct|coconstruct]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-f-d
|-
! Lemma
| kahafad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihafad|thihafad]] || [[word:jihafad|jihafad]] || [[word:shihafad|shihafad]] || [[word:kihafad|kihafad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhafad|thuthuhafad]] || [[word:jujuhafad|jujuhafad]] || [[word:shushuhafad|shushuhafad]] || [[word:kukuhafad|kukuhafad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhafad|thuhafad]] || [[word:juhafad|juhafad]] || [[word:shuhafad|shuhafad]] || [[word:kuhafad|kuhafad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhafad|thuhafad]] || [[word:juhafad|juhafad]] || [[word:shuhafad|shuhafad]] || [[word:kuhafad|kuhafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehafad|thehafad]] || [[word:jehafad|jehafad]] || [[word:shehafad|shehafad]] || [[word:kehafad|kehafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohafad|thothohafad]] || [[word:jojohafad|jojohafad]] || [[word:shoshohafad|shoshohafad]] || [[word:kokohafad|kokohafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohafad|thohafad]] || [[word:johafad|johafad]] || [[word:shohafad|shohafad]] || [[word:kohafad|kohafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohafad|thohafad]] || [[word:johafad|johafad]] || [[word:shohafad|shohafad]] || [[word:kohafad|kohafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhafad|thĂŠhafad]] || [[word:jĂŠhafad|jĂŠhafad]] || [[word:shĂŠhafad|shĂŠhafad]] || [[word:kĂŠhafad|kĂŠhafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahafad|thathahafad]] || [[word:jajahafad|jajahafad]] || [[word:shashahafad|shashahafad]] || [[word:kakahafad|kakahafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahafad|thahafad]] || [[word:jahafad|jahafad]] || [[word:shahafad|shahafad]] || [[word:kahafad|kahafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahafad|thahafad]] || [[word:jahafad|jahafad]] || [[word:shahafad|shahafad]] || [[word:kahafad|kahafad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahafad|shahafad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahafad|goshahafad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahafad|gokishahafad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahafadnĂŒ|shahafadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahafadnknĂŒ|goshahafadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahafadnĂŒ|gokishahafadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahafadshĂ«|shahafadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahafadnkshĂ«|goshahafadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahafadshĂ«|gokishahafadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahafadro|shahafadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahafadnkro|goshahafadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahafadro|gokishahafadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahafadmu|shahafadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahafadnkmu|goshahafadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahafadmu|gokishahafadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahafadsher|shahafadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahafadnksher|goshahafadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahafadsher|gokishahafadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahafadng|shahafadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahafadnkng|goshahafadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahafadng|gokishahafadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahafadya|shahafadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahafadnkya|goshahafadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahafadya|gokishahafadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahafadyam|shahafadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahafadnkyam|goshahafadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahafadyam|gokishahafadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahafadnĂŒshĂ«|shahafadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahafadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahafadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahafadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahafadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahafadnĂŒro|shahafadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahafadnknĂŒro|goshahafadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahafadnĂŒro|gokishahafadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahafadnĂŒmu|shahafadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahafadnknĂŒmu|goshahafadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahafadnĂŒmu|gokishahafadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahafadshĂ«nĂŒ|shahafadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahafadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahafadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahafadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahafadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahafadshĂ«ro|shahafadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahafadnkshĂ«ro|goshahafadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahafadshĂ«ro|gokishahafadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahafadshĂ«mu|shahafadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahafadnkshĂ«mu|goshahafadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahafadshĂ«mu|gokishahafadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahafadronĂŒ|shahafadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahafadnkronĂŒ|goshahafadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahafadronĂŒ|gokishahafadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahafadroshĂ«|shahafadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahafadnkroshĂ«|goshahafadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahafadroshĂ«|gokishahafadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahafadromu|shahafadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahafadnkromu|goshahafadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahafadromu|gokishahafadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahafadmunĂŒ|shahafadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahafadnkmunĂŒ|goshahafadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahafadmunĂŒ|gokishahafadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahafadmushĂ«|shahafadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahafadnkmushĂ«|goshahafadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahafadmushĂ«|gokishahafadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahafadmuro|shahafadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahafadnkmuro|goshahafadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahafadmuro|gokishahafadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
